boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 shows TX-44 exemption certificate pending despite matching buyer, ship-to, category, and date. STD-JAD-090-P requires full exemption-status class verification before release. WARN-JAD-090 confirms stale certificates. Action may not proceed; escalate for resolution of status-class dependency.
